description:
Returns all available custom field data types for a company, including their variants. This endpoint provides information about which data types are enabled for the company based on feature flags, the list of values (LOV) data types, and the available variants for each data type.

When `field_set_id` or `type` parameters are provided, the variants will be filtered to only include those supported by the specified field set.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Configurable field set type to filter data type variants.  If provided, only variants supported by this field set type will be returned. For GenericToolItem, append the generic_tool_id (e.g., 'Conf...

parameters.name: field_set_id
parameters.description: ID of an existing configurable field set.  If provided, only variants supported by this specific field set will be returned. Takes priority over the 'type' parameter if both are provided.

all.description: Array of all enabled data types for the company

lov.description: Array of LOV (List of Values) data types

variants.description: Object mapping data types to their available variants
